summary: Plan-only PR inventory assessment. No GitHub mutations are planned. One contributor PR has a bounded repair path; the remaining PRs are not merge-ready because required merge preflight proof, review-bot resolution, failing checks, or maintainer product judgment is missing.

actions.reason: Merge is blocked by product/App Store compatibility judgment and missing required Codex review preflight.
Patch looks narrow and passing, but merge policy requires a completed Codex /review preflight before a merge recommendation.
Useful contributor PR is not merge-ready because latest real behavior proof failed; repair the contributor branch narrowly before merge consideration.
Broad feature/config/test/docs delta plus failing checks and missing hydrated discussion require maintainer judgment; no narrow repair artifact is safe from this shard.
Checks pass, but merge preflight is incomplete because prior Codex review-bot suggestions are not proven resolved and no clean /review pass is present.

needs_human: #91967: maintainer product/App Store compatibility decision plus missing Codex /review preflight.

#75961: broad Discord feature/config/test/docs delta, failed checks, and unhydrated active discussion.
#76811: passing checks but unresolved or unproven Codex review-bot preflight and possible unrelated agent-runtime file touch.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #76666 by keeping the builtin-backend memory preload scope, investigating the failed Real behavior proof, and making the smallest branch update needed for proof and check stability before any merge recommendation.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(memory): preload builtin session transcript listeners at startup
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair plan for Clownfish follow-up on source PR #76666.

Credit: based on @buyitsydney's contributor PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/76666.

Scope: keep the fix limited to builtin session-file memory backend startup listener preloading, its gateway startup tests, and the existing changelog note.

Validation: inspect the failed Real behavior proof job, repair the smallest issue found, run `pnpm test src/gateway/server-startup-memory.test.ts`, run `pnpm check:changed`, and rerun the PR real behavior proof before merge consideration.
validation_commands: rerun Real behavior proof for PR #76666 after repair
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @buyitsydney and PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/76666 in any repaired branch or replacement PR body.
Keep the existing contributor-authored CHANGELOG credit if the final patch remains user-facing.
